# kAudioDeviceTransportTypeContinuityCapture | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Audio ](/documentation/coreaudio)

- [ kAudioDeviceTransportTypeContinuityCapture ](/documentation/coreaudio/kaudiodevicetransporttypecontinuitycapture)

-  kAudioDeviceTransportTypeContinuityCapture 

Global Variable# kAudioDeviceTransportTypeContinuityCapture

iOS 16.0–16.0DeprecatediPadOS 16.0–16.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 16.0–16.0DeprecatedmacOS 13.0–13.0Deprecated

```
var kAudioDeviceTransportTypeContinuityCapture: UInt32 { get }
```

Deprecated

Please use kAudioDeviceTransportTypeContinuityCaptureWired and kAudioDeviceTransportTypeContinuityCaptureWireless to describe Continuity Capture devices.
